title: Experiment Run List Response Schema
description: Response schema for GET /api/v1/experiment-runs/{experiment_id}/runs — returns a bare {runs:[...]} payload (experiment_run_routes is in the 'bare' wrap-map list). The experiment_data embed shape mirrors ExperimentModelParameters from experiment_run_schema.json; the decision to tighten or widen the embed is deferred to TraigentBackend#1134.

runs.description: List of experiment runs for the requested experiment. Currently unpaginated (all runs for the experiment are returned); pagination is a TraigentBackend#1134 follow-up.
